question.en: What is Node.js and how does its event-driven architecture work?
question.hi: Node.js क्या है और इसका event-driven architecture कैसे काम करता है?
question.gu: Node.js શું છે અને તેનું event-driven architecture કેવી રીતે કામ કરે છે?
question.hi_en: Node.js kya hai aur iska event-driven architecture kaise kaam karta hai?
question.gu_en: Node.js shu chhe ane enu event-driven architecture kevi rite kaam kare chhe?

hint.en: Hint: Mention that Node.js is a runtime environment that uses an event loop and event emitters to trigger callbacks asynchronously.
hint.hi: संकेत: बताएं कि Node.js एक रनटाइम वातावरण है जो एसिंक्रोनस रूप से कॉलबैक को ट्रिगर करने के लिए एक इवेंट लूप का उपयोग करता है।
hint.gu: સંકેત: સમજાવો કે Node.js એ રનટાઇમ છે જે ઇવેન્ટ લૂપ અને કોલબેક્સનો ઉપયોગ કરે છે.
hint.hi_en: Hint: Batao ki Node.js JS runtime hai jo event loop aur callbacks ke through async execution karta hai.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Kaho ke Node.js JavaScript runtime chhe je event loop ane callback thi asynchronous work kare chhe.

positive_points: Identified Node.js as a Chrome V8 runtime
missing_points: Could detail how event emitters work
suggestions: Highlight that Node.js is a runtime, not a framework.
Explain the single-threaded nature of Node.js.
evaluation.improved_answer: Node.js is an open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime environment built on Chrome's V8 engine. Its event-driven architecture operates by registering listener functions (callbacks) for specific events. When an event occurs (like an I/O operation completing), it is pushed to an event queue and processed asynchronously by the event loop.

question.en: Explain the Node.js Event Loop phases.
question.hi: Node.js Event Loop के phases को समझाइए।
question.gu: Node.js Event Loop ના તબક્કાઓ (phases) સમજાવો.
question.hi_en: Node.js Event Loop ke phases ko explain karein.
question.gu_en: Node.js Event Loop na phases ne explain karo.

hint.en: Hint: The event loop phases include Timers, Pending Callbacks, Idle/Prepare, Poll, Check, and Close Callbacks.
hint.hi: संकेत: इवेंट लूप चरणों में Timers, Poll, Check, और Close Callbacks शामिल हैं।
hint.gu: સંકેત: ઇવેન્ટ લૂપના તબક્કામાં Timers, Poll, Check અને Close Callbacks સામેલ છે.
hint.hi_en: Hint: Event loop ke key phases Timers, Poll, Check, Close Callbacks aur process.nextTick stack ke baare me batao.
hint.gu_en: Hint: Timers, Poll, Check phase na naam aapo.

positive_points: Explained Poll phase and Timer phase differences
missing_points: Could clarify where setImmediate and process.nextTick fit in
suggestions: Break down the execution loop phase-by-phase (Timers -> Pending -> Poll -> Check -> Close).
Explain the difference between microtasks and macrotasks.
evaluation.improved_answer: The Node.js event loop executes tasks in specific phases: 1) Timers (setTimeout/setInterval callbacks), 2) Pending Callbacks (deferred I/O), 3) Idle/Prepare, 4) Poll (retrieves new I/O events), 5) Check (setImmediate callbacks), and 6) Close Callbacks (socket.on('close')). process.nextTick runs immediately after the current phase.
